title: Homes Plugin
description: Basic plugin with /sethome and /home functionality for easy player teleportation
body:
🏠 ServerHomes – Simple, Powerful Home Teleportation
Set your home, teleport with ease, and never get lost again.

ServerHomes is a lightweight, no-fuss plugin that gives players the power to set and teleport to their personal home location. Perfect for survival, SMPs, and any server that values convenience without the clutter.\

✨ Features
✅ Simple /sethome and /home commands

🧭 Stores precise world coordinates, including pitch/yaw

📂 Lightweight YAML storage (no database needed)

🔒 Per-player data — no conflicts

⚡ Blazing fast and optimized for PaperMC


🚀 Usage
/sethome – Sets your current location as your home

/home – Instantly teleports you back to your saved home


📦 Why Choose ServerHomes?
Zero config, plug-and-play

Clean code, no lag, no bloat

Works seamlessly with all worlds

Ideal for small servers or large SMPs
